creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
All plist errors were identified.

Entries for libharu in pkg-plist may only be respected, when option 
WITH_HARU is set (PLIST_SUB+).

Libraries of opencv and liblas are only be found by configure, if 
LDFLAGS+ explixitly sets the right path for configure args (as done 
before for libharu). So I had to put the existing lines outside of 
WITH_HARU definition.
